overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 driving through Night City during a toxic acid rain storm. The player travels from the North Oak residential area through a tunnel into the downtown district with massive holographic advertisements, then toward a corporate plaza with red neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale residential avenue with palm trees

events.description: orange navigation sign for North Oak appears on left side of road

agents.ego_description: driving forward through heavy toxic green rain on a multi-lane road, passing palm tree lined streets

entered.detail: silhouetted palm trees visible through green toxic rain
orange holographic navigation sign indicating North Oak district
futuristic residential structures partially obscured by rain and fog

segments.scene_description: Driving through the North Oak residential district during a toxic acid rain storm. Palm trees line the road while futuristic buildings are visible through the green haze. An orange holographic navigation sign indicates the district name as the vehicle proceeds down the wet multi-lane avenue.

events.description: vehicle enters dark tunnel or underpass, visibility drops significantly
exits tunnel into downtown district revealing massive holographic advertisements on skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: passing through dark underpass and emerging into the downtown commercial district

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the highway underpass
tall vertical digital billboard displaying purple humanoid figure
tall vertical digital billboard displaying yellow portrait
silhouettes of high-rise buildings against the green toxic sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel or underpass, temporarily sheltering from the rain. Upon exiting, the scene opens into the downtown district dominated by massive holographic billboards displaying colorful figures on the sides of skyscrapers. The transition from enclosed darkness to the neon-lit urban canyon is dramatic.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial district with holographic advertising

events.description: vehicle slows down and makes a sharp turn through downtown streets, speed drops to 4
visibility decreases as vehicle re-enters heavy rain area leaving the dense downtown core

agents.ego_description: navigating through downtown streets, slowing for sharp turns, passing multiple holographic advertisements on both sides

entered.detail: vertical digital billboard displaying blue figure
vertical digital billboard displaying pink figure

segments.scene_description: Navigating through the dense downtown district, the vehicle passes between towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The driver slows down to make sharp turns as the speedometer drops to 4, then accelerates back into open road with heavy rain reducing visibility again.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza approaching mega-building with red neon trim

events.description: large corporate building with distinctive horizontal red neon lighting becomes visible on left side

agents.ego_description: driving toward a large corporate complex with prominent red neon accents on the building facade

entered.detail: massive corporate headquarters with distinctive horizontal red neon lighting strips on upper floors
factory-like industrial buildings with smokestacks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the holographic advertisement district behind, the vehicle approaches a massive corporate building distinguished by bright red neon trim along its roofline. The industrial complex looms in the distance through the heavy green rain as the vehicle continues toward the corporate plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a toxic rainstorm, transitioning from a hazy residential district into a neon-drenched urban center and finally toward a corporate monolith. It begins on a wet multi-lane avenue in North Oak, where palm trees and futuristic buildings are shrouded in a thick green haze beneath an orange holographic navigation sign. The camera then plunges into the darkness of a tunnel, providing a brief shelter before emerging into a dramatic urban canyon dominated by massive, colorful holographic billboards on towering skyscrapers. As the vehicle navigates the dense downtown district, it slows for sharp turns amidst the glowing advertisements before accelerating back into the heavy rain. The scene finally shifts away from the holographic displays as a massive corporate building with bright red neon trim looms through the green precipitation in the distance.
